title: palicourea costenorum
intro: Palicourea costenorum, also known as Costen's palicourea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Palicourea costenorum include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. In herbal preparations, Palicourea costenorum is often used in teas, infusions, and topical applications, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
